judge_reason: Both sides agree on the core visual category (hand-drawn sketch of a circular saucer craft), but Description B adds extensive specific component labels and textual annotations that Description A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch of a circular "saucer" craft, showing internal components and mechanisms. The sketch is a cross-section or cutaway view.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A handwritten technical sketch on a document page showing a large circle with two horizontal rod-like assemblies inside, multiple arrows and handwritten labels, and a short paragraph of cursive text above the diagram.*
